title: Lup's Wares and Supplies

'''Lup's Wares and Supplies''', commonly known as '''Lup's General Store''', was a location in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The store was was owned by two [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]], [[Kal Lup]] and [[Tar Lup]] and located near [[Outer Curved Street/Legends|Outer Curved Street]], near [[Spaceport Speeders/Legends|Spaceport Speeders]].

The store was stocked with provisions, supplies, and machinery for sale. Customers in need of weapons and [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]] were directed to stores that specialized in that kind of equipment.<ref name="Manhunt">''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]''</ref>

The Lups sold everything from provisions to supplies and machinery. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] at least one [[Mobquet Swoops and Speeders/Legends|Mobquet]] [[A-1 Deluxe Floater/Legends|A-1 Deluxe Floater]] was available for sale at the store. Many items could be viewed through touch-screens where the items were promoted. The less legal activities took place in a bathroom and the store's offices.

The owners had some problems with [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]], because even when sales were low, Jabba kept asking the same amount of protection money.<ref name="GG7" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Lups_General_Store_on_map.jpg|250px|thumb|Lup's on a map of Mos Eisley]]
''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars Trilogy]]'' changed the location of the store. It was first located near the [[Cantina/Legends|Cantina]].
